title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what difficulties elderly people might face with technology and what benefits it could bring to their lives.

images.label: A
images.description: An elderly woman squinting at a smartphone screen, looking confused while a younger person tries to explain how to use it

images.label: B
images.description: An older man happily video-calling his grandchildren on a tablet, with a big smile on his face and family photos visible on the shelf behind him

followUp.question: What do you think is the most important way technology can improve the lives of elderly people?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what benefits intergenerational activities might have for both young and old participants.

images.label: D
images.description: A teenage boy teaching an elderly woman how to play a video game, both laughing as she struggles with the controller

images.label: E
images.description: An older man and a young girl gardening together in a community allotment, the man guiding her hands to plant seeds

followUp.question: Do you think modern society does enough to bridge the gap between generations? Why or why not?
